overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a scenic mountain valley, leaving the trail to approach a waterfall, climbing the rocky cascade, and standing at the top to observe the panoramic view of snow-capped peaks and forested valleys.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with wildflower meadows

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the mountain valley, surrounded by coniferous trees and colorful wildflowers with snow-capped peaks in the distance

entered.detail: tall snow-covered mountain peaks forming the backdrop of the valley
dense pine and spruce trees covering the mountain slopes
winding dirt path through the grassy meadow
grassy areas with red and yellow wildflowers alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt trail through a sunlit mountain valley. Snow-capped peaks rise in the distance while dense coniferous forests flank the path. Colorful wildflowers dot the grassy meadows on either side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy riverbank with scattered young pine trees

events.description: Geralt leaves the dirt path and enters the grassy meadow heading toward the river

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grass and wildflowers toward the river, navigating around small pine trees and approaching the water's edge

entered.detail: clear flowing river becoming visible through the trees on the left
rocky shoreline along the river's edge
small young pine trees scattered throughout the grassy area

segments.scene_description: Leaving the established trail, Geralt moves through tall grass toward the river. The terrain becomes rougher as he approaches the rocky riverbank, navigating around young pine trees with the snow-capped mountains still visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky waterfall ascent with rushing water

events.description: Geralt begins climbing up the rocky waterfall face
reaches the top of the waterfall, water spray and mist become prominent

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky waterfall edge, using hands and feet to scale the wet stones while water rushes beside him

entered.detail: rushing waterfall cascading down the rocky cliff face
wet rocky outcrop forming the edge of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: Geralt climbs the rocky face of the waterfall, transitioning from grass to wet stone. The water cascades beside him as he ascends the cliff edge, with the river now visible rushing below and the valley opening up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall overlook with panoramic mountain valley view

events.description: Geralt stops climbing and stands still to observe the valley view
camera pans around to show different angles of the waterfall and valley

agents.ego_description: standing on the waterfall edge, rotating to look at the scenic mountain valley, the water rushing below, and the surrounding forested cliffs

entered.detail: panoramic view of the forested valley and distant mountains from the waterfall top

segments.scene_description: At the top of the waterfall, Geralt stands on the rocky outcrop taking in the panoramic view. The camera pans to reveal the full scope of the valley, with the waterfall now to the side, the river flowing below, and vast forests stretching toward the distant snow-capped peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins on a peaceful mountain trail and ascends a rugged waterfall to reveal a vast panoramic vista. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through sunlit meadows filled with wildflowers and flanked by dense coniferous forests. As he leaves the established trail, the camera follows him through tall grass and rougher terrain toward a rocky riverbank with snow-capped peaks looming ahead. The scene then shifts as he climbs the wet stone face of the waterfall, ascending the cliff edge while the rushing river drops away below. Finally, the camera reaches the rocky outcrop at the summit and pans outward to reveal the full scope of the valley, stretching from the cascading water across endless forests toward the distant mountains.
